name: INTERN FOX
short_description: Intern Fox is an exciting game in which you as intern Anna Fox go on a search for stolen jewelry in an ice bunker in Antarctica. Help Anna find all the treasures to prove her professional skills and earn a spot in the police department.
detailed_description:
Intern Fox is an exciting game in which you as intern Anna Fox go on a search for stolen jewelry in an ice bunker in Antarctica. Help Anna find all the treasures to prove her professional skills and earn a spot in the police department. Use the radar to find objects, improve your search skills and enjoy the exciting story of the game. Get ready for adventures and challenges in Intern Fox game! You need to find all the objects that are in the maze.

Features:
- nice graphics;
- simple controls;
- interesting gameplay.
